name: Conductor
description: Central orchestrator for transparent multi-agent DeFi economy on Mantle. Accepts high-level goals (e.g. 'optimize yield on mETH+USDY with ≤7% risk'), performs live research against real endpoints (mETH LSP, Ondo USDY oracle/docs, Merchant Moe LBFactory 0xa6630671775c4EA2743840F9A5016dCf2A104054), delegates to ERC-8004 sub-agents, and writes every reasoning step + action to DecisionLogger. Full auditability for users and judges.

research_sources: live from Researcher (4) + direct RPC + Pyth via mantle-agent-kit-sdk
integrations: DecisionLogger (rich metrics, service payments, parent chains, reasoningHash)

skills.name: Run 5-Agent Orchestra
skills.description: Decompose goal, delegate via A2A-style, log to DecisionLogger, post reputation, return verified allocation.
